description: Analyze digital marketing performance in /home/ga/Documents/digital_ad_performance.xlsx. In the 'Ad_Data' sheet, calculate CTR, CPC, CPA, and ROAS, ensuring the CPA field displays 'No Conversions' when conversions are zero. Create a 'Channel_Summary' sheet with headers 'Channel', 'Total Spend', 'Total Revenue', and 'Channel ROAS' to aggregate performance for the Search, Display, Social, and Video channels. Save the updated workbook to /home/ga/Documents/digital_ad_performance.xlsx.
